02 / 10STRATEGIC OVERVIEW
SECTION · 01

Beyond Extrusion.
Engineering Excellence.

Nasr Kabeer Aluminum Co., Ltd. (NKACO) is a premier manufacturer of high-performance aluminum extrusions, strategically positioned in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia to serve global industrial and transportation sectors.

01 · IDENTITY
Premium
Saudi Manufacturer

Vertically integrated aluminum-extrusion enterprise — casting our own billets, designing our own dies, formulating our own coatings, engineering our own thermal-break systems.

02 · LOCATION
Dammam Third
Industrial City

Anchored at Everwin Industrial Park in the Kingdom's Eastern Province — proximate to GCC ports, energy infrastructure, and Saudi Arabia's heavy industry corridor.

03 · ALIGNMENT
Vision 2030
Industrial Anchor

Delivering local value creation, export diversification, and sustainable manufacturing aligned with the Kingdom's industrial transformation agenda.

NKACO · ALX
02 / 10
AI-READY OPERATIONSAutomated press logic · real-time QC · intelligent flow
03 / 10BY THE NUMBERS
SECTION · 02

By the Numbers — Capacity, Precision & Automation.

01 · CAPACITY
200,000T / YR
Designed Annual Capacity
Heavy-tonnage extrusion capacity calibrated for architectural, industrial, and transportation demand at Vision 2030 scale.
02 · EXPORT
30–40%
Export Target Share
Targeting 30–40% export share across GCC and global markets — reducing dependence on domestic demand and broadening the Kingdom's industrial export base.
03 · PRECISION
±0.05MM
Die-Controlled Tolerance
In-house H13 tool-steel die design enables ±0.05 mm tolerance control, ensuring dimensional stability across long and complex extrusion profiles.
04 · AUTOMATION
100%
Automated Production Lines
Fully automated extrusion lines with intelligent process control — real-time monitoring, servo-driven press management, and automated QC inspection ensuring consistent output at scale.
Source · NKACO Operating Specifications, 2026FIG. 03 / 10
NKACO · ALX
03 / 10
APPLICATION MAPArchitectural · Industrial · Mobility
04 / 10PRODUCT PORTFOLIO
SECTION · 03

Three Verticals.
One Standard of Precision.

From curtain wall to EV battery tray — our extrusions serve three demanding markets, each engineered to its own specification on a shared foundation of metallurgical control.

01
A
Architectural

Window, Curtain Wall & Facade

Thermally broken profiles for tower glazing, premium fenestration, and high-performance facade systems engineered for Gulf-region climate loads.

  • Curtain Wall Profiles
  • Thermal-Break Windows
  • Sliding & Casement Systems
  • Architectural Cladding
02
I
Industrial

Heavy Structural & Heat-Transfer

Large-tonnage structural extrusions, machinery profiles, and high-fin heat sinks for industrial machinery, energy systems, and electronics thermal management.

  • Structural Sections
  • Heat Sinks · High Aspect Ratio
  • Solar Mounting Frames
  • Industrial Machine Frames
03
T
Transportation

Mobility & EV Components

Crash-engineered profiles, EV battery enclosures, and lightweight body structures supporting the auto industry's pivot to aluminum-intensive electric platforms.

  • EV Battery Trays
  • Crash Management Profiles
  • Bodywork & Bumper Beams
  • Rail & Logistics Profiles
NKACO · ALX
04 / 10
05 / 10VERTICAL INTEGRATION
SECTION · 04

From Billet to Finished Profile —
Under One Roof.

Vertical integration is our metallurgical advantage. We control every stage — eliminating supply-chain handoffs and tightening tolerance, lead time, and traceability.

STAGE · 01
Casting
690 – 720 °C
In-house billet casting controls alloy chemistry from the start — every billet logged with its melt heat number.
STAGE · 02
Die Design
H13 TOOL STEEL
Proprietary die engineering and CNC machining — geometry that defines every profile we ship.
STAGE · 03
Extrusion
±0.05 MM TOL.
Multi-press extrusion with closed-loop temperature and ram-speed control — heart of the operation.
STAGE · 04
Surface
POWDER · ANODIZE
In-house powder coating, anodizing, and thermal-break polyamide insertion — finishes formulated, not outsourced.
STAGE · 05
QC & Ship
T6 / T7 AGED
T6/T7 aging, dimensional QC, packaging — every order traceable back to casting heat number.
NKACO · ALX

08 / 10CERTIFICATIONS · COMPLIANCE
SECTION · 07

Globally Certified.
Market-Ready.

Our extrusions meet the most rigorous international standards for aluminum profiles, surface treatment, and industrial safety — enabling direct market access across GCC and global markets.

SASO
CERTIFIED
Saudi Standards, Metrology & Quality Organization
Mandatory Saudi conformity certification covering product safety, dimensional standards, and material specifications for aluminum extrusions sold in the Kingdom. Prerequisite for all domestic supply and government project eligibility.
SCOPE · PRODUCT CONFORMITY · KSA MARKET · MANDATORY
GSO
COMPLIANT
Gulf Standardization Organization
GCC-wide technical standards for aluminum building profiles (GSO 1125, GSO 2063) and anodized coatings — ensures direct market access across all six GCC countries without re-certification.
SCOPE · ALUMINUM PROFILES · SURFACE TREATMENT · GCC MARKET
QUALICOAT
IN PROGRESS
International Quality Label — Powder Coating on Aluminium
The globally recognized quality mark for organic coatings on aluminum for architectural applications. Required by major international facade contractors and specifiers for export projects (Europe, Asia, Americas).
SCOPE · POWDER COATING · ANODIZING · EXPORT MARKETS
ISO 9001
Quality Management System
ISO 14001
Environmental Management
ISO 45001
Occupational Health & Safety
EN 755
Aluminium Alloy Extruded Products
ASTM B221
Aluminium Alloy Extruded Bars / Shapes
NKACO · ALX
08 / 10
09 / 10ENGINEERING EXPERTISE
SECTION · 08

30+ Years of Aluminum
Extrusion Mastery.

CORE TEAM
30+
Years of
Industry Experience

Our core engineering team brings over three decades of hands-on aluminum extrusion expertise — from alloy metallurgy and die design to surface engineering and precision QC.

01 · DIE ENGINEERING
H13 Die Design & CNC Machining

In-house die design and machining — from complex hollow profiles to multi-void thermal-break sections, engineered to ±0.05 mm.

02 · ALLOY METALLURGY
Billet Casting & Heat Treatment

Deep knowledge of 6xxx and 7xxx alloy systems — controlling chemistry, homogenization, and aging to achieve target mechanical properties.

03 · SURFACE TECHNOLOGY
Coating, Anodizing & Thermal Break

Mastery of powder coating, anodizing, sublimation, and PA66 thermal-break insertion — formulated in-house for Gulf climate durability.

04 · PROJECT DELIVERY
Custom Profiles from Brief to Ship

From client brief to prototyping, validation, and volume production — our team has delivered complex extrusion programs across architectural, industrial, and transport sectors.
